name: Protein Pancakes
tagline: Flips like the real thing, hits like a shake.

variants.name: Chocolate
variants.swaps: Add 1 tbsp cocoa powder to batter

variants.name: Blueberry
variants.swaps: Fold in 50g frozen blueberries

steps.title: Blend batter
steps.text: Blitz oats into flour, add protein powder, eggs, yogurt. Rest 2 min.
steps.cue: Batter is thick like cake batter, not runny

steps.title: Cook
steps.text: Heat pan to medium, light oil. Pour quarter cup per pancake, flip when bubbles form.
steps.cue: Edges set, bubbles do not close - that is the flip moment

steps.title: Serve hot
steps.text: Stack and top. They firm up as they cool.
steps.cue: Golden brown, not burnt

rescues.fix: Non-stick pan essential, or more oil
Add 2 tbsp water to batter, thin it slightly

name: Egg White French Toast
tagline: Crisp edges, zero yolk guilt, all the cinnamon.

steps.title: Whisk dip
steps.text: Egg whites, milk, cinnamon, pinch salt. Bread in 30 seconds per side.

steps.title: Pan-fry
steps.text: Medium heat, light oil. Cook 2 min per side till golden and set.

steps.title: Serve
steps.text: Stack, dust cinnamon. Maple is optional; protein is not.

rescues.fix: Bread was too thin - use bakery slices, rest 10 sec only
Non-stick pan, or a touch more oil on the flip

name: High Protein Hot Oats
tagline: Porridge that passes the macro audit.

variants.name: Chocolate
variants.swaps: Add 1 tbsp cocoa and chocolate whey

ingredients.display: 2 egg whites, whisked in at the end

steps.title: Simmer oats
steps.text: Oats and milk, medium heat, stir 4 min till thick.

steps.title: Protein off heat
steps.text: Pull off heat, whisk in whey and egg whites. Rest 1 min - residual heat cooks the whites.

steps.title: Top
steps.text: Cinnamon, berries if you have them. Eat while steamy.

rescues.fix: Off heat always - hot pan turns whey into rubber
Simmer 2 more min before the protein step

name: Overnight Oats
tagline: Fridge does the work; you get the credit.

variants.name: Tiramisu
variants.swaps: Instant coffee + cocoa instead of fruit

variants.name: Mango lassi
variants.swaps: 50g mango pulp + pinch cardamom

steps.title: Jar it
steps.text: Oats, yogurt, milk, whey in a jar. Stir till no dry pockets.

steps.title: Chill overnight
steps.text: Lid on, fridge at least 6 hours. Oats hydrate while you sleep.

steps.title: Top and eat
steps.text: Berries on top cold. No cooking required.

rescues.fix: Not enough liquid - add 2 tbsp milk and wait 2 hours
Use plain whey and skip honey - fruit carries enough

name: Masala Omelette
tagline: The five-minute answer to every hungry morning.

spice.dial_up: Two green chillies and a pinch of garam masala
spice.dial_down: Skip the chilli, keep the onion and coriander

variants.name: Veggie-loaded
variants.swaps: Add 40g capsicum and 30g tomato to the mix

variants.name: Roti roll
variants.swaps: Wrap in one whole wheat roti

steps.title: Whisk
steps.text: Beat eggs and whites with onion, chilli, coriander, salt. Thirty seconds of real whisking.
steps.cue: Mix looks pale and slightly frothy

steps.title: Set
steps.text: Medium heat, oil in, pour and tilt to spread. Let it set without poking.
steps.cue: Edges lift clean off the pan

steps.title: Fold
steps.text: Fold in half, thirty more seconds, slide out.
steps.cue: Center is just set, still soft

rescues.fix: Pan was not hot enough before the pour - let oil shimmer first
Pull it earlier, the center finishes on the plate

name: Shakshuka
tagline: Eggs poached in angry tomato - brunch with opinions.

spice.dial_up: Harissa swirl at the end
spice.dial_down: Sweet paprika only

steps.title: Build the sauce
steps.text: Oil, onion, capsicum 5 min. Garlic, cumin, chilli, tomato. Simmer 8 min till thick.

steps.title: Nest the eggs
steps.text: Make wells, crack eggs in, lid on low 4-5 min.

steps.title: Serve in the pan
steps.text: Runny yolks are the point. Bread for scooping.

rescues.fix: Pull at whites-set-yolks-runny; they carry over
Simmer uncovered 3 more min before adding eggs

name: Greek Yogurt Bowl
tagline: Breakfast that looks like dessert and behaves like protein.

steps.title: Whisk base
steps.text: Yogurt and whey till silky - no lumps.

steps.title: Layer
steps.text: Berries, honey drizzle, pistachio crunch on top.

rescues.fix: Whisk into room-temp yogurt first, then chill
Honey fixes it; do not skip the fat from nuts

name: Paneer Toast
tagline: Open-faced, spiced, and faster than ordering in.

steps.title: Toast base
steps.text: Bread dry-toasted or lightly buttered in pan till crisp.

steps.title: Scramble topping
steps.text: Oil, onion, chilli, paneer, tomato, turmeric 4 min till dry-ish.

steps.title: Load and serve
steps.text: Pile hot paneer on toast. Eat immediately - sogginess waits for no one.

rescues.fix: Paneer mix must be dry; toast both sides
More green chilli and a pinch of chaat masala if you have it

name: Besan Chilla
tagline: A savory pancake that lives in your pantry.

spice.dial_up: Minced green chilli in the batter
spice.dial_down: Skip ajwain and chilli, keep turmeric

ingredients.display: 50g Greek yogurt whisked with mint, on the side

steps.title: Batter
steps.text: Whisk besan with water to a pourable batter, no lumps. Fold in onion, tomato, ajwain, turmeric, salt. Rest 5 min.
steps.cue: Ribbon falls off the whisk and holds for a second

steps.title: Spread
steps.text: Medium heat, half the oil, ladle batter and spread in circles from the center out.
steps.cue: Tiny holes appear across the surface

steps.title: Flip and finish
steps.text: Flip when the edges brown, scatter paneer, fold over.
steps.cue: Underside is freckled golden, not pale

rescues.fix: It was too thin - whisk in a spoon of besan
Cook lower and longer, besan needs a full toast

name: Moong Dal Chilla
tagline: Soaked overnight, stuffed by morning.

spice.dial_up: Green chilli in the grind
spice.dial_down: Just ginger, no chilli

ingredients.display: 60g moong dal, soaked 4 hours (1 katori dry)
60g paneer, crumbled with salt for stuffing

steps.title: Grind
steps.text: Blend soaked dal with ginger, chilli, jeera, salt and a splash of water to a smooth batter.
steps.cue: Batter is silky, thick enough to coat a spoon

steps.title: Cook the base
steps.text: Spread on a medium hot pan like a dosa, drizzle oil around the edge.
steps.cue: Edges crisp and pull away first

steps.title: Stuff and fold
steps.text: Scatter salted paneer down the middle, fold both sides over, press 20 seconds.
steps.cue: Paneer warms through but stays soft

rescues.fix: Loosen with water one spoon at a time
Grind finer - grainy batter will not bind

name: Egg Bhurji Pav
tagline: Street-cart energy, weekday macros.

spice.dial_up: Extra green chilli plus pav bhaji masala
spice.dial_down: Half the chilli, more tomato

ingredients.sub: butter if it is that kind of day

steps.title: Base
steps.text: Oil, then onion and chilli till the onion softens. Tomato and turmeric in, cook till jammy.
steps.cue: Tomato loses its raw smell and darkens

steps.title: Scramble
steps.text: Pour beaten eggs, drop the heat, push gently with a spatula. Do not rush.
steps.cue: Soft folds form, still glossy

steps.title: Serve
steps.text: Coriander on top, toasted pav on the side.
steps.cue: Bhurji is moist, never dry crumbles

rescues.fix: Tomato went in too late or too much - cook it down before eggs
Heat was high - pull off flame, a spoon of curd rescues it

name: Protein Lassi / Smoothie
tagline: Chaas energy, gym macros, mango optional.

variants.name: Mango
variants.swaps: 80g mango pulp + cardamom pinch

variants.name: Coffee
variants.swaps: 1 tsp instant coffee instead of fruit

steps.title: Blend
steps.text: Everything 30 seconds till frothy and pale.

steps.title: Pour tall
steps.text: Over ice if summer. Cardamom dust on foam.

rescues.fix: More milk, 2 tbsp at a time
Blend curd alone first, then add whey

name: Pesarattu
tagline: Andhra moong dosa - green, crisp, no fermentation drama.

steps.title: Grind batter
steps.text: Drain dal, blitz with ginger, chilli, jeera, salt, minimal water - thick pourable.

steps.title: Spread thin
steps.text: Hot tawa, oil swirl, ladle batter, spread edge-to-edge like dosa.

steps.title: Crisp and fold
steps.text: Medium-high 3 min till lacey and green-gold. Fold, serve with chutney.

rescues.fix: Add water tablespoon by tablespoon
Tawa must be properly hot before the batter hits

name: Chicken Burrito Bowl
tagline: The delivery-app order you can out-cook in fifteen.

spice.dial_up: Chipotle-style: extra chilli powder plus a pinch of smoked paprika
spice.dial_down: Skip the chilli, lime and corn carry it

variants.name: Paneer bowl
variants.swaps: Swap chicken for 120g paneer, sear hard

ingredients.display: 30g rajma dry weight, boiled (or a katori of leftover rajma, drained)
40g corn, charred in the dry pan
30g tomato, diced with onion for salsa
juice of half a lime, over everything
1 tsp chilli powder in the chicken rub

steps.title: Sear
steps.text: Rub chicken with chilli powder, salt, half the lime. Hot pan, oil, sear 5 minutes.
steps.cue: Edges catch and darken - that is the burrito shop smell

steps.title: Char the corn
steps.text: Same pan, corn in the dry corner for 2 minutes till spotted.
steps.cue: A few kernels pop and blacken

steps.title: Assemble in lanes
steps.text: Rice, beans, chicken, corn, salsa - side by side, not stirred. Lime over the top.
steps.cue: Looks like the menu photo - lanes matter

rescues.fix: It is always lime and salt on the rice, not more chilli
Cubes were small - go bigger and pull earlier

leftovers.freezer: Chicken and beans freeze, rest fresh

name: Rajma-Rice Mexican Bowl
tagline: Kidney beans meet lime and capsicum - desi rajma, burrito energy.

steps.title: Sizzle aromatics
steps.text: Oil, cumin, capsicum 2 min. Rajma and spices in.

steps.title: Fold rice
steps.text: Cooked rice, tomato, lime. Toss 2 min off heat.

steps.title: Bowl it
steps.text: Top with coriander, extra lime. Guac if feeling fancy.

rescues.fix: Splash of rajma cooking liquid or 2 tbsp water
Use day-old rice - fresher grains collapse

name: Chicken Fried Rice
tagline: Cold rice was the plan all along.

spice.dial_up: Chilli oil or crushed pepper at the end
spice.dial_down: Skip pepper, let soy do the work

variants.name: Egg fried rice
variants.swaps: Swap chicken for 2 eggs plus 2 whites, scramble first

ingredients.display: 120g chicken breast, small dice or shredded leftovers

steps.title: Sear the chicken
steps.text: Highest heat your pan allows. Oil, chicken, do not move it for a minute.
steps.cue: Edges brown before you stir

steps.title: Aromatics
steps.text: Garlic and capsicum in, 45 seconds, keep everything moving.
steps.cue: Garlic smells toasted, not burnt

steps.title: Rice
steps.text: Cold rice in, break clumps with the back of the spatula, soy around the rim of the pan, toss.
steps.cue: Grains separate and jump in the pan

rescues.fix: Rice was warm or fresh - spread it on a plate in the fridge for 10 min first
Salt the chicken, not just the soy - and finish with white pepper

name: Garlic Chicken Rice
tagline: One pan, forty cloves of attitude, done before delivery arrives.

steps.title: Sear chicken
steps.text: Hot pan, oil, chicken 3 min till edges golden. Remove.

steps.title: Garlic rice
steps.text: Same pan, garlic 30 sec, rice in, soy, toss 2 min.

steps.title: Combine
steps.text: Chicken back, spring onion, 1 min. Serve immediately.

rescues.fix: Lower heat - garlic wants to sizzle, not blacken
Break clumps with the back of the spoon before adding soy

name: Thai Basil Chicken
tagline: Ten loud minutes, one quiet pan.

spice.dial_up: This dish wants bird's eye chillies - two more
spice.dial_down: One chilli, seeds out, still tastes like Bangkok

leftovers_become.note: yesterday's basil chicken is tomorrow's fried rice seasoning

ingredients.display: 150g chicken, hand-chopped small - not mince, not cubes
1 tbsp soy sauce (stand-in for fish sauce plus dark soy)
ingredients.sub: fish sauce if you own it, halve the amount

ingredients.display: big handful basil - Thai holy basil if lucky, Italian works
100g cooked jasmine or basmati, to serve

steps.title: Flavor the oil
steps.text: Oil on high, garlic and chilli for 20 seconds - moving constantly.
steps.cue: Garlic golden at the edges, kitchen smells sharp

steps.title: Chicken hard and fast
steps.text: Chicken in, spread flat, leave 1 minute, then toss. Soy and sugar in.
steps.cue: Sauce reduces to a sticky glaze, no puddle

steps.title: Kill the heat, add basil
steps.text: Flame off, basil in, fold till it wilts glossy.
steps.cue: Basil wilts but stays dark green - heat off is the trick

rescues.fix: It cooked in the pan - always off-heat, residual warmth is enough
Pan was not hot enough - crank it and reduce 1 more minute

leftovers.reheat: Hot pan 2 min, fresh basil if you have it

name: Tofu Stir Fry
tagline: Crisp tofu, slick sauce, no sad wok skills required.

steps.title: Crisp tofu
steps.text: Dust tofu in corn flour. Hot pan, oil, sear 3 min per side. Remove.

steps.title: Wok veg
steps.text: Garlic, capsicum 2 min high heat. Soy and splash water for sauce.

steps.title: Toss and serve
steps.text: Tofu back in, spring onion, 30 sec. Over rice if hungry.

rescues.fix: Press 15 min first; do not move cubes early in the pan
Pan not hot enough - wok heat is the whole trick

name: Chickpea Mediterranean Salad
tagline: No stove, all crunch, protein from the can.

steps.title: Drain and season
steps.text: Chickpeas rinsed, patted dry. Salt, pepper, lemon, olive oil.

steps.title: Chop and fold
steps.text: Cucumber, tomato, herbs. Toss gently - do not mash the beans.

rescues.fix: Chickpeas were too wet - dry them on a towel
More lemon and a pinch of cumin

name: Mediterranean Chicken Bowl
tagline: Grilled chicken, hummus, and the illusion of a Greek holiday.

steps.title: Season chicken
steps.text: Oregano, lemon, salt, pepper. Pan or grill 6 min per side, rest, slice.

steps.title: Build bowl
steps.text: Rice base, chicken, cucumber, tomato. Hummus dollop on the side.

steps.title: Finish
steps.text: Olive oil drizzle, extra lemon. Eat warm or packed cold.

rescues.fix: Pull at 65 C internal - carryover does the rest
Hummus and lemon fix everything - do not skip

leftovers.reheat: Chicken cold or quick pan sear

name: Soya Keema Bowl
tagline: The vegetarian keema that fools carnivores.

spice.dial_up: Extra garam masala and green chilli
spice.dial_down: Halve the chilli powder, add a spoon of curd

steps.title: Rehydrate and mince
steps.text: Boil soya chunks 5 min, squeeze hard, pulse in a mixer to a keema texture.
steps.cue: Squeezed chunks feel like damp sponge, not wet

steps.title: Masala base
steps.text: Oil, onion till golden, ginger, then tomato with the dry spices till the oil separates.
steps.cue: Masala darkens and smells sweet, not raw

steps.title: Bring together
steps.text: Soya keema and peas in with a splash of water. Simmer 5 min, finish with coriander.
steps.cue: Keema absorbs the masala color evenly

rescues.fix: You skipped the squeeze - boil, cool slightly, wring it out twice
A splash of hot water and 2 min of lid-on rest

leftovers.reheat: Pan with a splash of water

name: Sprouts Chaat Bowl
tagline: Street chaat logic, gym protein, zero deep fry.

steps.title: Steam optional
steps.text: Raw sprouts are fine; 2 min steam if you prefer softer.

steps.title: Chaat toss
steps.text: Everything in a bowl, aggressive mix, eat immediately while crisp.

rescues.fix: Drain sprouts well - chaat hates puddles
More kala namak and lime - chaat is supposed to shout

name: Tandoori Chicken
tagline: The air fryer earns its counter space.

spice.dial_up: Double the chilli powder, add crushed pepper
spice.dial_down: Halve the chilli, lean on the lime and ginger

leftovers_become.note: shred, mint yogurt, roll
dice, wok-toss with cold rice
shred the leftovers, warm tortillas, instant desi-mex tacos

ingredients.sub: mustard oil for the real thing

steps.title: Marinate
steps.text: Everything into a bowl, massage into the slashes. Thirty minutes minimum, overnight if you plan ahead.
steps.cue: Marinade stains the cuts deep red

steps.title: Air fry
steps.text: 200 C for 16 minutes, flip at 10.
steps.cue: Char spots on the ridges, juices run clear

steps.title: Rest and squeeze
steps.text: Three minutes of rest, then fresh lime over the top.
steps.cue: Steam slows before you cut

rescues.fix: Pat the marinade thinner next time and run 2 extra minutes
Pull at internal doneness, not the clock - thickest part just firm

leftovers.freezer: Freezes marinated and raw too, 1 month

host.plating: On a board, onion rings and lime wedges, mint raita in a bowl
host.prep_ahead: Marinate the night before, fry when guests arrive

name: Hariyali Chicken
tagline: Green from a blender, not a bottle.

spice.dial_up: Two extra green chillies in the grind
spice.dial_down: One chilli, seeds out

leftovers_become.note: shred, extra mint chutney

steps.title: Green paste
steps.text: Blend herbs, spinach, chilli, lime and yogurt to a thick chutney. No water if you can help it.
steps.cue: Paste holds its shape on a spoon

steps.title: Marinate
steps.text: Coat the chicken, rest 30 minutes in the fridge.
steps.cue: Chicken turns fully green, no white patches

steps.title: Air fry
steps.text: 190 C for 14 minutes, flip once. Slightly gentler than tikka so the herbs do not scorch.
steps.cue: Edges catch, paste stays green not brown

rescues.fix: Blender ran hot - pulse instead of blitzing, and always add lime
Yogurt was watery - hang it in a sieve for 10 min first

host.call_it: hariyali chicken, green as it looks
host.plating: White plate, lime wedge, raw onion crescent
host.prep_ahead: Marinate before guests arrive, fry to order

name: Chicken Tikka
tagline: Charred at home, no tandoor required.

spice.dial_up: More red chilli powder or fresh green chillies
spice.dial_down: Halve the chilli powder, skip the garam masala

leftovers_become.note: shred, mint yogurt
dice, wok-toss
shred the leftovers, warm tortillas, instant desi-mex tacos

variants.name: Paneer Tikka
variants.swaps: 200g paneer cubes, marinate 15 min only, fry 10 min

steps.title: Marinate
steps.text: Mix yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, spices, and oil. Coat chicken cubes well. Rest 20 minutes or overnight.
steps.cue: Marinade clings, does not drip

steps.title: Air fry
steps.text: Arrange in a single layer at 200 C. Cook 15 minutes, flip once halfway.
steps.cue: Golden char on edges, juices run clear when pierced

steps.title: Rest
steps.text: Let sit 2 minutes before serving.
steps.cue: Carry-over cooking keeps them juicy

rescues.fix: Pull at 12 min, they carry-over cook
Shake off excess before air frying, or lower temp to 180 C

host.plating: Skewer optional, lemon wedge and mint sprig essential
host.prep_ahead: Marinate before they arrive, cook fresh when seated

name: Home-style Chicken Curry
tagline: The curry your week orbits around.

spice.dial_up: Whole green chillies split into the gravy
spice.dial_down: Kashmiri chilli only - color without fire

leftovers_become.note: drain gravy, shred, roll in a roti

ingredients.display: 1 tsp garam masala, at the end
10g oil (2 tsp) - the gravy needs it

steps.title: Brown the onions
steps.text: Oil on medium-high, onions with a pinch of salt. This is the flavor, do not shortcut it.
steps.cue: Deep golden, edges catching brown

steps.title: Bhuno
steps.text: Ginger-garlic 1 min, then tomato and dry spices. Cook hard, splash water if it sticks.
steps.cue: Oil beads at the edges of the masala

steps.title: Simmer
steps.text: Chicken in, coat well, then a cup of hot water. Lid on, 12 minutes. Garam masala and coriander to finish.
steps.cue: Gravy coats the back of a spoon

rescues.fix: The bhuno was rushed - simmer 5 more minutes uncovered
Fish out chicken, boil gravy hard for 3 min, return chicken

leftovers.reheat: Low flame with a splash of water

name: Butter Chicken, Light
tagline: The crowd-pleaser, rebuilt on cashews and honesty.

spice.dial_up: A tsp of chilli powder in the gravy
spice.dial_down: It is already gentle - add more milk

leftovers_become.note: thicken gravy, roll with raw onion

ingredients.display: 1 tsp kasuri methi, crushed between palms

steps.title: Gravy base
steps.text: Simmer tomato, ginger, garlic, cashews with half a cup of water for 10 min. Cool 2 min, blend silky smooth.
steps.cue: Blender pours like thick soup, no bits

steps.title: Finish the gravy
steps.text: Butter in the pan, pour the puree, garam masala, simmer 5 min. Milk in last.
steps.cue: Color turns from red to sunset orange

steps.title: Chicken and methi
steps.text: Seared chicken in, kasuri methi crushed over the top, 3 min more.
steps.cue: Methi aroma lifts off the pan - that is the dish

rescues.fix: Tomatoes were sharp - a pinch of sugar balances, do not add more butter
Milk went into a boiling pan - drop the heat, whisk, it comes back

host.plating: Wide bowl, swirl of yogurt, kasuri methi dusted on top
host.prep_ahead: Gravy two days ahead, chicken on the night

name: Egg Curry
tagline: Boiled eggs, promoted to dinner.

spice.dial_up: Slit green chillies in the simmer
spice.dial_down: Half the chilli powder, finish with coriander

ingredients.display: 2 extra whites, boiled with the eggs (optional protein top-up)

steps.title: Blister the eggs
steps.text: Halve the oil, roll the boiled eggs in the pan with a pinch of turmeric till golden spots form. Set aside.
steps.cue: Skins blister and freckle

steps.title: Gravy
steps.text: Rest of the oil, jeera till it crackles, onion till golden, tomato and spices till the oil separates.
steps.cue: Masala smells sweet, not sharp

steps.title: Simmer
steps.text: A cup of hot water, eggs back in, lid on for 5 min. Slash the eggs so gravy gets inside.
steps.cue: Gravy clings to the egg whites

rescues.fix: They were cold - bring to room temp, prick once with a fork
Simmer uncovered 3 min, it tightens fast

leftovers.reheat: Low flame, do not microwave the eggs hard

name: Dal Tadka, Protein-Boosted
tagline: Comfort in a katori, with numbers that behave.

spice.dial_up: Dried red chillies in the tadka
spice.dial_down: Just jeera and garlic in the ghee

variants.name: Double tadka
variants.swaps: Second ghee tadka poured at the table

ingredients.sub: half moong for a lighter dal

ingredients.display: 20g soya chunks, minced fine - the invisible boost
ingredients.sub: skip and accept the protein dip

steps.title: Pressure cook
steps.text: Dal, minced soya, tomato, turmeric, salt, 3 cups water. Four whistles.
steps.cue: Dal mashes against the spoon with no resistance

steps.title: Whisk
steps.text: Open, whisk to your texture. Thin with hot water if needed.
steps.cue: Pours like a thick soup

steps.title: Tadka
steps.text: Ghee, jeera till it crackles, garlic till golden, chilli powder off the heat. Pour over and lid for a minute.
steps.cue: The sizzle when tadka hits dal - wait for it

rescues.fix: Salt and a squeeze of lime, then judge again
Start over with the ghee - burnt garlic ruins the pot

leftovers.reheat: Loosen with hot water, fresh tadka if you are feeling it

aka: dal fry (same family, extra fried onion)

name: Dal Makhani, Lighter
tagline: Slow-cooked soul without the cream coma.

steps.title: Pressure cook
steps.text: Both dals, tomato, ginger-garlic, salt, 4 whistles till mashable.

steps.title: Simmer down
steps.text: Open, simmer 10 min, butter and garam masala. Crush a few beans for body.

steps.title: Finish
steps.text: Kasuri methi crushed in, final butter swirl. Rest 5 min - dal thickens standing.

rescues.fix: Simmer uncovered; dal always lies about thickness
Kasuri methi and butter at the end - non-negotiable

name: Rajma
tagline: Sunday's most dependable pot.

spice.dial_up: Extra garam masala and a slit chilli
spice.dial_down: Go easy on chilli powder, the dish carries itself

ingredients.display: 8g ginger, half in the masala, half julienned on top
80g Greek yogurt, stirred in the bowl - the protein finisher

steps.title: Pressure cook
steps.text: Soaked rajma, salt, water two inches above. Five to six whistles, then let pressure drop on its own.
steps.cue: A bean crushes flat between two fingers

steps.title: Masala
steps.text: Oil, jeera, onion till brown, ginger, then tomato and dry spices. Bhuno till the oil peeks out.
steps.cue: Masala leaves the sides of the pan

steps.title: Marry them
steps.text: Beans and their water into the masala. Simmer 15 min, mash a few beans against the side to thicken.
steps.cue: Gravy turns creamy from the mashed beans, not from cream

rescues.fix: Old stock or hard water - pressure cook 3 more whistles with a pinch of soda
Mash more beans and simmer uncovered - patience beats cornflour

leftovers.verdict: Day two is the whole point
leftovers.reheat: Low flame with a splash of water

name: Chole
tagline: Dark, deep, and worth the overnight soak.

spice.dial_up: Anardana or amchur for sharper punch
spice.dial_down: Half the chilli, skip the crushed pepper

ingredients.display: 1 heaped tsp chole masala or garam masala

steps.title: Cook the chana
steps.text: Pressure cook soaked chana with salt and a tea bag for that dhaba color. Five whistles.
steps.cue: Chana squashes easily, skins intact

steps.title: Masala
steps.text: Oil, onion till deep brown, ginger-garlic, tomato, all dry spices. Cook it darker than feels safe.
steps.cue: Masala turns almost chocolate brown

steps.title: Simmer and smash
steps.text: Chana in with its water. Simmer 15 min, smash a ladleful against the pot for body.
steps.cue: Gravy coats the chana instead of pooling

rescues.fix: The tea bag trick, and brown the onions properly next round
Pinch of sugar or a spoon of curd smooths it out

host.plating: Julienned ginger, a green chilli, lime wedge on top
host.prep_ahead: Make it entirely the day before - it only improves

name: Palak Paneer, Light
tagline: Green gravy that skips the cream and keeps the silk.

spice.dial_up: Green chilli in the blanch
spice.dial_down: Already gentle - skip the chilli entirely

variants.name: Palak tofu
variants.swaps: Swap paneer for firm tofu, press it first

steps.title: Blanch and shock
steps.text: Spinach into boiling water 90 seconds, straight into cold water. Blend with the chilli.
steps.cue: Leaves stay bright green - grey means overcooked

steps.title: Base
steps.text: Oil, jeera, garlic till golden, onion till soft. Pour in the green puree, simmer 4 min.
steps.cue: Puree loses its raw leaf smell

steps.title: Paneer in
steps.text: Cubes and milk in, 2 gentle minutes. Do not boil hard after the milk.
steps.cue: Paneer warms soft, gravy stays glossy

rescues.fix: Overcooked - next time shock the spinach and keep the simmer short
Soak cubes in warm salted water 10 min before they go in

leftovers.verdict: Fine next day, color dulls a little

host.call_it: palak paneer without the cream guilt trip
host.plating: Swirl of yogurt, julienned ginger on top
host.prep_ahead: Puree ahead, paneer in at the last minute

name: Paneer Bhurji
tagline: Scrambled paneer for nights that need saving.

spice.dial_up: Pav bhaji masala instead of garam masala
spice.dial_down: Skip green chilli, keep it mellow

steps.title: Sweat the base
steps.text: Oil, onion, chilli, capsicum. Two minutes on high, keep them crunchy.
steps.cue: Onion goes translucent, capsicum still bright

steps.title: Tomato and spice
steps.text: Tomato, turmeric, salt. Cook until soft but not saucy.
steps.cue: Tomato slumps but holds shape

steps.title: Paneer
steps.text: Crumbled paneer and garam masala, fold for 2 minutes only. Coriander to finish.
steps.cue: Paneer heats through - longer makes it chewy

rescues.fix: Tomato had too much juice - spoon some out before the paneer
It overcooked - a splash of milk and 30 seconds with the lid on softens it

leftovers.verdict: Fine next morning in a roti
leftovers.reheat: Quick pan toss, splash of water

name: Chicken 65
tagline: Red, loud, and gone in ten minutes.

spice.dial_up: It is already loud - add sliced green chilli in the tempering
spice.dial_down: Kashmiri chilli only, halve the pepper

leftovers_become.note: chop, toss through at the end

variants.name: Paneer 65
variants.swaps: 200g paneer, skip the marination wait

steps.title: Marinate
steps.text: Chicken with curd, chilli, ginger-garlic, salt, corn flour. Twenty minutes.
steps.cue: Coating looks like thick red paint

steps.title: Air fry
steps.text: 195 C, 14 minutes, shake at 7. Light oil spray helps the crust.
steps.cue: Crust sets hard enough to knock

steps.title: Temper
steps.text: Teaspoon of oil in a hot pan, curry leaves till they crackle, chicken in, toss 30 seconds.
steps.cue: Leaves shatter crisp and coat the chicken

rescues.fix: Marinade was wet - the curd should barely coat, add corn flour
Serve with curd on the side and lime over the top

leftovers.reheat: Air fryer 3 min brings some crust back

host.call_it: chicken 65, the good kind of loud
host.plating: Pile on a plate over raw onion rings, lime wedges all around
host.prep_ahead: Marinate ahead, fry in batches as people arrive

aka: dry chilli chicken (indo-chinese cousin - finish with a soy-chilli toss)

name: Andhra Pepper Chicken
tagline: Black pepper doing what chilli only dreams of.

spice.dial_up: Fresh crushed pepper at the finish too
spice.dial_down: Halve the pepper, it stays interesting

leftovers_become.note: shred, it seasons the whole pan

ingredients.display: 1.5 tsp black pepper, coarsely crushed - not powder
10g oil (2 tsp) - the dry roast needs it

steps.title: Sear
steps.text: Hot pan, half the oil, chicken in a single layer. Brown hard, remove.
steps.cue: Deep brown crust on two sides

steps.title: Build
steps.text: Rest of the oil, curry leaves, garlic, ginger, chilli, onion. Cook till the onion browns at the edges.
steps.cue: Kitchen smells like an Andhra mess hall

steps.title: Toss dry
steps.text: Chicken back with crushed pepper and salt. Toss on high till it clings dry and glossy.
steps.cue: No liquid left, pepper coats every piece

rescues.fix: It burned - add pepper with the chicken, not into hot oil alone
Pan overcrowded - two batches, always

host.call_it: Andhra pepper chicken, handle with rice
host.plating: Serve in the pan if it looks the part, curry leaves on top
host.prep_ahead: Cube and salt the chicken ahead, cook in one loud burst

name: Methi Chicken
tagline: Bitter greens, tender chicken, Punjabi weekday magic.

steps.title: Brown chicken
steps.text: Oil, onion till gold, chicken 5 min. Ginger-garlic, spices.

steps.title: Wilt methi
steps.text: Methi in - it wilts fast. Tomato, simmer covered 8 min.

steps.title: Reduce
steps.text: Uncover, reduce till sauce clings. Methi should be soft, not crunchy.

rescues.fix: Add 2 tbsp yogurt at the end to round it
Cover during simmer; chicken breast needs moisture

name: Soya Chaap Masala
tagline: Mock meat that actually earns the gravy.

steps.title: Sear chaap
steps.text: Oil, chaap 4 min till golden. Remove.

steps.title: Gravy
steps.text: Onion-tomato masala, cashew paste, simmer 8 min.

steps.title: Simmer together
steps.text: Chaap back, 5 min covered. Finish with garam masala.

rescues.fix: Do not overcook - 5 min in gravy max
Cashew paste off heat, whisk smooth first

name: Kadhi with Baked Pakoras
tagline: Sour, silky, and simmered like your grandmother meant it.

spice.dial_up: Dried red chillies and a pinch of chilli powder in the tadka
spice.dial_down: Already gentle

ingredients.display: 150g curd, a day old and sour (1.5 katori)
ingredients.sub: fresh curd plus 1 tsp lime juice

ingredients.display: 50g besan, split - 20g in the kadhi, 30g for pakoras

steps.title: Whisk and simmer
steps.text: Whisk curd, 20g besan, turmeric, salt and 2 cups water till lump-free. Simmer 15 min, stirring the first 5.
steps.cue: Raw besan smell disappears, kadhi coats a spoon

steps.title: Bake the pakoras
steps.text: Thick batter of 30g besan, onion, salt, pinch of chilli. Blobs into the air fryer, 180 C for 10 min.
steps.cue: Pakoras sound hollow when tapped

steps.title: Tadka and drop
steps.text: Ghee, rai, jeera, curry leaves. Pour over the kadhi, drop pakoras in 5 min before serving.
steps.cue: Pakoras drink the kadhi but keep a little bite

rescues.fix: It boiled before the besan cooked - whisk hard and keep the first simmer gentle
Dropped too early - they go in at the end, not the start

leftovers.reheat: Gentle flame, thin with water, never boil hard

name: Stuffed Paneer Paratha
tagline: Crisp outside, molten paneer inside - tiffin royalty.

ingredients.display: 2 roti dough balls or 2 store rotis to stuff

steps.title: Fill
steps.text: Paneer, onion, chilli, coriander, salt. Seal inside rolled dough.

steps.title: Roll and cook
steps.text: Roll gently, tawa with ghee, 2 min per side till speckled gold.

steps.title: Serve hot
steps.text: Crisp paratha waits for no one. Raita mandatory.

rescues.fix: Seal edges with water pinch; roll thicker
Low heat longer - colour lies on parathas

name: Chole Kulcha Bowl
tagline: Street chole, deconstructed for the bowl era.

steps.title: Warm chole
steps.text: Leftover chole or quick chole: chickpeas in onion-tomato masala 10 min.

steps.title: Toast kulcha
steps.text: Kulcha in oven or tawa till crisp at the edges.

steps.title: Bowl
steps.text: Kulcha pieces, chole ladle, onion, coriander. Amchoor if you have it.

rescues.fix: Toast separately, add at the last second
Use chole recipe spices: dhania, jeera, anardana

name: Chicken Keema Matar
tagline: Mince, peas, and a pan that empties itself.

spice.dial_up: Green chillies and extra garam masala
spice.dial_down: Mild but stays warm from ginger

leftovers_become.note: spoon into a roti, keema roll

steps.title: Base
steps.text: Oil, onion till golden, ginger-garlic, then tomato and dry spices till the masala tightens.
steps.cue: Masala pulls together into one mass

steps.title: Keema
steps.text: Mince in on high heat, breaking constantly with the spatula. No lumps allowed.
steps.cue: Mince turns from pink to pale, crumbles fine

steps.title: Peas and steam
steps.text: Peas, half cup water, lid on for 6 minutes. Garam masala and coriander to close.
steps.cue: Peas bright and just tender, keema moist

rescues.fix: Went in over low heat - crank it and break fast next time; for now chop through it
Splash of water and a small knob of butter revives it

leftovers.reheat: Pan with a splash of water
leftovers.freezer: Freezes flat in a bag, 1 month

name: Palak Chicken
tagline: Saag energy, chicken protein, lighter than the takeaway version.

steps.title: Sear chicken
steps.text: Oil, chicken 4 min. Set aside.

steps.title: Spinach base
steps.text: Onion-tomato masala, spinach puree, simmer 5 min.

steps.title: Combine
steps.text: Chicken back, 8 min covered. Bright green, not army green.

rescues.fix: Blanch spinach, ice bath, blend cold
Pinch of sugar and lemon at the end

name: Amritsari Fish
tagline: Ajwain-spiked, batter-crisped, straight off the highway.

spice.dial_up: Chaat masala plus extra chilli in the batter
spice.dial_down: Ease the chilli, keep the ajwain - that is the soul

ingredients.display: 1 tsp ajwain, crushed in the palm
ingredients.sub: no sub - this is the dish

ingredients.display: juice of half a lime, plus wedges to serve

steps.title: Marinate
steps.text: Fish with ginger-garlic, chilli, lime, salt. Twenty minutes in the fridge.
steps.cue: Fish firms slightly and smells bright

steps.title: Batter
steps.text: Besan, ajwain, pinch of turmeric, water to a thick paste. Coat each finger fully.
steps.cue: Batter hangs on the fish without dripping

steps.title: Air fry
steps.text: 195 C for 12 minutes, flip at 7, oil spray on both sides.
steps.cue: Crust golden and crackled, fish flakes inside

rescues.fix: Fish was wet - pat dry hard before the batter
The lime marinade fixes most of it - never skip it with basa

leftovers.reheat: Air fryer 3 min if you must

host.plating: Newspaper cone if you are being fun, chaat masala dusted
host.prep_ahead: Marinate ahead, batter and fry when drinks are poured

name: Dahi Chicken
tagline: Yogurt-cooked, no cream, still swoon-worthy.

steps.title: Brown chicken
steps.text: Oil, chicken, remove. Fry onion till deep gold.

steps.title: Yogurt low
steps.text: Heat off, yogurt in slowly, whisking. Never boil yogurt.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.text: Chicken back, garam masala, 12 min low. Finish coriander.

rescues.fix: Yogurt was not room temp - whisk off heat always
Pinch sugar and longer simmer mellows it

name: Chicken Alfredo
tagline: Creamy pasta without the cream guilt trip.

steps.title: Pasta and chicken
steps.text: Boil penne. Sear chicken in butter-garlic, remove.

steps.title: Sauce
steps.text: Milk, yogurt, parmesan off heat - whisk smooth.

steps.title: Toss
steps.text: Pasta, chicken, sauce, splash pasta water. Silky, not gluey.

rescues.fix: Yogurt off heat; pasta water saves everything
More pasta water - alfredo is a emulsion, not a coating

name: Chicken Arrabbiata
tagline: Angry sauce, calm macros.

spice.dial_up: Arrabbiata means angry - more chilli flakes is canon
spice.dial_down: Halve the flakes, it becomes a very good pomodoro

variants.name: Paneer arrabbiata
variants.swaps: 120g seared paneer instead of chicken

ingredients.display: 120g chicken, strips, grilled in the pan first

steps.title: Pasta and chicken in parallel
steps.text: Penne into salted boiling water. Meanwhile sear seasoned chicken strips in the oil, remove.
steps.cue: Pasta 1 minute short of the packet time

steps.title: Angry sauce
steps.text: Same pan: garlic and chilli flakes 30 seconds, tomato and oregano in, simmer 5 minutes.
steps.cue: Sauce darkens and thickens to coat a spoon

steps.title: Marry with pasta water
steps.text: Pasta and chicken into the sauce with a ladle of starchy water. Toss 1 minute, parmesan over.
steps.cue: Sauce clings to every tube - the water is the glue

rescues.fix: Tomatoes were sharp - pinch of sugar, 2 more minutes of simmer
You drained too early - always finish pasta in the sauce

leftovers.reheat: Pan with a splash of water

host.plating: Wide bowl, parmesan snowfall, one basil leaf if you have it
host.prep_ahead: Sauce keeps 3 days - boil pasta when they sit down

aka: pink sauce pasta (stir 30ml warm milk in at the end)

name: Aglio e Olio
tagline: Garlic, oil, pasta - the Italian midnight snack that scales.

variants.name: Chicken
variants.swaps: 120g chicken instead of prawns

steps.title: Boil pasta
steps.text: Salted water, pasta to al dente. Save a cup of water.

steps.title: Garlic oil
steps.text: Low heat olive oil, garlic till pale gold - not brown.

steps.title: Toss
steps.text: Pasta, prawns, chilli, pasta water. Parsley. Eat immediately.

rescues.fix: Burnt garlic is trash - start fresh, lower heat
Pasta water emulsifies - add more, toss harder

name: Pesto Chicken Pasta
tagline: Basil punch, chicken bulk, fifteen-minute trattoria.

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.text: Boil penne. Grill chicken strips in same timeline.

steps.title: Toss
steps.text: Drain pasta, pesto, parmesan, sliced chicken. Splash water if tight.

rescues.fix: Room-temp pesto with hot pasta water loosens it
Half pesto, half yogurt thins without killing flavor

name: Pink Sauce Pasta
tagline: Tomato meets cream - the sauce that pleases everyone.

steps.title: Base
steps.text: Sear chicken, remove. Garlic, tomato simmer 5 min.

steps.title: Pink it
steps.text: Yogurt off heat, whisk in. Penne and chicken, toss.

steps.title: Finish
steps.text: Parmesan, black pepper. Sauce should coat, not pool.

rescues.fix: Yogurt off heat always
Balance tomato and yogurt 2:1 by eye

name: Skillet Lasagna
tagline: All the lasagna payoff, none of the casserole dish.

steps.title: Layer in skillet
steps.text: Sauce base, pasta, chicken, cheese. Repeat once.

steps.title: Simmer covered
steps.text: Low 12 min with splash water till pasta soft.

steps.title: Broil or lid-off
steps.text: Cheese bubble and brown. Rest 5 min before cutting.

rescues.fix: More water, lower heat, lid on longer
Lid off last 5 min to reduce

name: Protein Mac and Cheese
tagline: Kraft nostalgia with adult macros.

steps.title: Boil mac
steps.text: Salted water, mac till just tender.

steps.title: Blend sauce
steps.text: Cottage cheese, whey, milk, blitz smooth.

steps.title: Marry
steps.text: Drain mac, sauce in pan low heat 2 min till glossy.

rescues.fix: Blend cottage cheese longer; sieve if paranoid
Use unflavored whey and more cheese

name: Chicken Parmesan
tagline: The cutlet that made red sauce famous.

spice.dial_up: Chilli flakes in the sauce
spice.dial_down: It arrives mild

leftovers_become.note: slice cold cutlet into the wrap, skip the sauce

ingredients.display: 180g chicken breast, butterflied and pounded even
1 egg white, beaten, for the dredge
20g panko mixed with oregano and salt
100g tomato, cooked down to a quick sauce with garlic
5g parmesan into the crumb - the namesake
1 tsp oregano, split between crumb and sauce

steps.title: Bread it
steps.text: Chicken through egg white, then the parmesan-panko. Press the crumb on hard.
steps.cue: Full coverage, no bald patches

steps.title: Air fry
steps.text: 200 C, 12 minutes, flip at 7, oil spray both sides.
steps.cue: Crumb deep golden and sounds crisp when tapped

steps.title: Sauce and melt
steps.text: Spoon sauce over, mozzarella on, back in for 3 minutes.
steps.cue: Cheese melts and just starts to spot brown

rescues.fix: Sauce went under the cutlet - always on top, never below
Cutlet was thick - pound it flatter, it is not optional

host.plating: Over a smear of sauce, basil leaf, parmesan dust
host.prep_ahead: Bread the cutlets in the morning, fry at dinner

aka: chicken katsu (skip the marinara, serve over rice with lemon)

name: Creamy Tuscan Chicken
tagline: Sun-dried tomatoes doing their best golden-hour impression.

spice.dial_up: Chilli flakes bloom nicely in the cream
spice.dial_down: Mild by design

ingredients.display: 180g chicken breast, halved into two thin steaks
80ml milk - the light stand-in for cream

ingredients.sub: double the fresh tomato, roasted hard

ingredients.display: 3g corn flour slurried in the milk

steps.title: Sear the steaks
steps.text: Salted chicken into hot oil, 4 minutes a side. Remove, rest.
steps.cue: Deep golden crust, firm but springy

steps.title: Build the sauce
steps.text: Same pan: garlic 30 seconds, sun-dried tomatoes 1 minute, then the milk-cornflour slurry and parmesan on low.
steps.cue: Sauce turns pale gold and coats the spoon

steps.title: Wilt and return
steps.text: Spinach folded in, chicken back with its juices, 2 gentle minutes.
steps.cue: Spinach silky, sauce hugging the chicken

rescues.fix: Boiled too hard after the milk - low flame, whisk, it recovers
Sun-dried tomatoes were rinsed of their salt - season and add a squeeze of lemon

host.call_it: creamy Tuscan chicken, cream not included
host.plating: In the pan, spinach and red tomato slivers visible - it plates itself
host.prep_ahead: Sear ahead, sauce takes 5 minutes at showtime

name: Chicken Tacos
tagline: Two tortillas, zero regrets.

spice.dial_up: Minced green chilli in the salsa
spice.dial_down: Yogurt crema mutes everything nicely

ingredients.display: 130g chicken, shredded after a chilli-cumin sear
30g onion, half in the salsa, half raw on top
30g Greek yogurt with lime - instant crema
1 tsp cumin, toasted and crushed into the rub
1 tsp chilli powder in the rub
half a lime, juiced over everything

steps.title: Rub and sear
steps.text: Chicken with cumin, chilli, salt. Sear 6 minutes, rest 2, shred with two forks.
steps.cue: Shreds pull apart with juice, not steam

steps.title: Char the tortillas
steps.text: Straight on the flame or dry pan, 15 seconds a side.
steps.cue: Leopard spots, still bendy

steps.title: Build
steps.text: Crema first, chicken, salsa, raw onion, lime. Two folds, eat over the plate.
steps.cue: First bite drips - that is correct

rescues.fix: They were cold - always warm them, steam in a cloth if stacking
Overfilled - two smaller tacos beat one collapsing one

leftovers.reheat: Chicken in a pan, tortillas on the flame

host.plating: Everything in bowls, tortillas under a cloth, let people work
host.prep_ahead: Shredded chicken and salsa ahead - assembly is the party

aka: chicken quesadilla (same filling - fold into a tortilla with cheese, pan-toast)

name: Chicken Fajitas
tagline: The dish that arrives still arguing with the pan.

spice.dial_up: Extra chilli in the marinade plus charred jalapeno if you find one
spice.dial_down: Paprika-forward, easy heat

leftovers_become.note: cold fajita strips, extra dressing

ingredients.display: 100g capsicum, two colors if possible, strips
1 heaped tsp chilli powder in the marinade
juice of most of a lime, marinade plus finish

steps.title: Marinate
steps.text: Chicken strips with chilli, cumin, lime, salt, half the oil. Fifteen minutes.
steps.cue: Strips stained brick red

steps.title: Sear in waves
steps.text: Screaming hot pan. Chicken first, remove. Then peppers and onion, barely 3 minutes - they should bite back.
steps.cue: Char stripes on the veg, still crunchy

steps.title: Reunite loudly
steps.text: Everything back together, last squeeze of lime, straight to the table in the pan.
steps.cue: Still sizzling when it lands - that is the dish

rescues.fix: Pan too crowded or too cool - fewer things, more heat, less time
Heat the empty pan 1 extra minute before the final toss

leftovers.verdict: Fine next day as wrap filling
leftovers.reheat: Hot pan, 2 min - microwave kills the crunch

host.plating: The pan is the plate - trivet, tortillas, guac, done
host.prep_ahead: Marinate and slice everything ahead - cook time is 8 loud minutes

name: Chicken Quesadilla, Light
tagline: Crisp tortilla, molten cheese, chicken that pulls.

steps.title: Fill
steps.text: Chicken, cheese, capsicum on half tortilla. Fold.

steps.title: Crisp
steps.text: Dry pan or light oil, 2 min per side till golden and cheese melts.

steps.title: Cut
steps.text: Triangles, guac on the side. Sour cream if feeling decadent.

rescues.fix: Lower heat, cover 1 min
Chicken must be dry; wet filling kills the crunch

name: Chipotle Paneer Skewers
tagline: Smoky paneer cubes that belong at a backyard grill.

steps.title: Marinate
steps.text: Paneer, capsicum, onion, hot sauce, lime, cumin 15 min.

steps.title: Skewer and cook
steps.text: Air fryer 190 C, 10 min, turn once. Char is good.

steps.title: Serve
steps.text: Guacamole dip, extra lime. Party food that happens to be veg.

rescues.fix: Do not over-marinate acid - 15 min max
More hot sauce or pinch of smoked paprika

name: Chicken Souvlaki Skewers
tagline: Greek street food, air-fryer reality.

steps.title: Marinate
steps.text: Chicken, yogurt, lemon, oregano, garlic 20 min minimum.

steps.title: Skewer and air fry
steps.text: 190 C, 12 min, turn once. Edges should char slightly.

steps.title: Serve
steps.text: Tzatziki, pita or rice. Lemon wedge mandatory.

rescues.fix: Pull at 12 min - breast carryover is real
More lemon and oregano - Greek food is not shy

host.plating: Skewers over tzatziki swipe
host.prep_ahead: Marinate before guests arrive

name: Chicken Shawarma Plate
tagline: Street spit flavor, oven-tray honesty.

spice.dial_up: Cayenne in the marinade, chilli oil on the plate
spice.dial_down: Already gentle - lemon does the talking

leftovers_become.note: shawarma caesar is a genre-bend that works

ingredients.sub: thighs are truer to the spit

ingredients.display: 50g Greek yogurt - half marinade, half garlic sauce
3 cloves garlic - 2 in the marinade, 1 raw in the sauce
quarter tsp turmeric - the shawarma gold
juice of a third of a lemon
1 large roti standing in for pita, flame-warmed
60g cucumber, chopped with tomato and onion for the salad

steps.title: Marinate
steps.text: Chicken in yogurt, spices, lemon, oil. Thirty minutes minimum.
steps.cue: Slabs turn turmeric gold

steps.title: Air fry hard
steps.text: 200 C for 14 minutes, flip once. You want edges that crackle.
steps.cue: Dark frizzled edges - the fake spit char

steps.title: Slice and plate
steps.text: Rest 2 minutes, slice thin against the grain. Plate with salad, garlic yogurt, warm roti.
steps.cue: Thin slices, juices pooling - spoon them back over

rescues.fix: Slabs too thick or fryer too full - thinner, hotter, single layer
Raw garlic mellow trick: grate it, salt it, wait 5 minutes before mixing

aka: chicken souvlaki (swap the spices for oregano and lemon)

name: Air Fryer Falafel
tagline: Crunchy outside, green inside, fried nowhere.

spice.dial_up: Green chilli in the grind
spice.dial_down: Skip chilli, cumin holds it up

ingredients.display: 90g dry chickpeas, soaked overnight - NEVER boiled, never canned
ingredients.sub: no sub - boiled chana makes hummus-balls that collapse

ingredients.display: 10g besan only if the mix will not bind

steps.title: Pulse, do not paste
steps.text: Soaked raw chickpeas, herbs, onion, garlic, cumin, salt. Pulse to coarse wet sand.
steps.cue: Grains like couscous that clump when squeezed

steps.title: Rest and shape
steps.text: Fridge 20 minutes, then roll golf balls and flatten slightly.
steps.cue: Balls hold shape without cracking

steps.title: Air fry
steps.text: 195 C, 14 minutes, flip at 8, spray again.
steps.cue: Deep brown crust, interior stays green and steamy

rescues.fix: Blitzed too fine or skipped the rest - spoon of besan and back to the fridge
Overcooked - pull 2 minutes earlier, they firm as they sit

leftovers.freezer: Freeze shaped and raw, fry from frozen plus 4 min

host.plating: Pile on hummus, drizzle of tahini thinned with lemon, mint on top
host.prep_ahead: Shape and refrigerate a day ahead - fry as guests graze

name: Lemon-Herb Grilled Fish
tagline: The lightest dinner on the whole board.

spice.dial_up: Chilli flakes with the herbs
spice.dial_down: Naturally mild

ingredients.display: 250g basa, two fillets, patted very dry
half a lemon - juice in the marinade, wedges to serve

steps.title: Marinate briefly
steps.text: Fish with lemon, garlic, herbs, salt, half the oil. Ten minutes - fish is not chicken, do not overdo it.
steps.cue: Flesh turns slightly opaque at the edges

steps.title: Pan or air fryer
steps.text: Hot pan with the rest of the oil, 3 minutes a side, veg in the gaps. Or 190 C air fryer for 10.
steps.cue: Flakes separate under gentle pressure

steps.title: Finish bright
steps.text: Fresh lemon and pepper over the top, straight to the plate.
steps.cue: Steam carries lemon and garlic - that is dinner

rescues.fix: Pan not hot enough or fish not dry enough - both, probably
Basa forgives - flake it into the veg with extra lemon and call it a warm salad

leftovers.reheat: Gently, or flake cold into a salad

host.plating: Whole fillet, char side up, lemon wedge, scatter of herbs
host.prep_ahead: Marinate 10 min before serving - this dish waits for no one

aka: fish in lemon butter (finish with a knob)

name: Harissa Chicken
tagline: North African heat, weeknight speed.

steps.title: Coat
steps.text: Harissa, honey, oil on chicken. Rest 10 min.

steps.title: Sear and simmer
steps.text: Hot pan sear 4 min, onion-tomato in, cover 10 min.

steps.title: Reduce
steps.text: Lid off, sauce reduces to coat. Harissa should hum, not scream.

rescues.fix: Yogurt swirl at the end tames harissa
Harissa burns fast - medium heat after the sear

name: Gochujang Chicken
tagline: Sweet heat that sticks to your ribs and your fingers.

spice.dial_up: Another spoon of gochujang, it scales linearly
spice.dial_down: Cut gochujang with extra honey and soy

leftovers_become.note: gochujang fried rice needs no other seasoning

ingredients.display: 20g gochujang (1 tbsp) - Blinkit stocks it now
ingredients.sub: 2 tsp chilli powder + 1 tsp miso or extra soy, not the same but close

ingredients.display: 5g toasted sesame oil (1 tsp) - the finisher

steps.title: Sear
steps.text: Chicken in a hot dry-ish pan (the sesame oil comes later), browned on two sides.
steps.cue: Golden edges, nearly cooked through

steps.title: Glaze
steps.text: Heat to medium. Gochujang, honey, soy, garlic, splash of water. Toss till it clings.
steps.cue: Sauce bubbles thick and lacquers every piece

steps.title: Finish
steps.text: Off heat, sesame oil over. Serve on rice.
steps.cue: Glossy red-brown shine - chopstick test: it should resist slightly

rescues.fix: Gochujang has sugar, it scorches fast - medium heat and keep it moving
A spoon of water and extra honey rounds it off

leftovers.reheat: Pan with a splash of water

host.plating: On rice, sesame oil sheen, spring onion if the fridge provides
host.prep_ahead: Sauce mixes ahead in a cup, dish cooks in 10 flat

aka: korean fried chicken glaze (on seared, not fried, chicken)

name: Teriyaki Chicken

name: Honey Garlic Chicken

Pat chicken dry before searing

name: Thai Green Curry
tagline: One paste, one can, one pan - and the flat smells incredible.

spice.dial_up: Fry extra paste, add sliced green chilli
spice.dial_down: More coconut milk - the curve is smooth

variants.name: Red curry
variants.swaps: Red paste 1:1 - sweeter, a touch deeper

variants.name: Tofu green curry

ingredients.display: 80ml coconut milk - the thick top of the can first
80g capsicum and whatever veg the drawer offers
2 tsp soy (fish sauce if you have it)

steps.title: Fry the paste

steps.title: Chicken and the rest

steps.cue: Basil perfumes the steam - serve immediately

Sugar and a squeeze of lime pull it back

leftovers.reheat: Low flame, do not boil the coconut hard

host.plating: Curry in a bowl, rice in another, basil on top - family style
host.prep_ahead: Chop everything ahead - the cook is 15 unattended-ish minutes

name: Japanese Curry Chicken
tagline: Golden roux comfort - the anime dinner, made at home.

steps.title: Brown aromatics

steps.title: Simmer

Dissolve roux in ladle of hot broth first

name: Chicken Katsu

steps.title: Air fry

steps.title: Slice and serve

Pound even thickness; pull at 12 min

name: Chilli Chicken
tagline: Indo-Chinese classic - crisp, saucy, aggressively moreish.

variants.name: Chilli paneer
variants.swaps: 150g paneer instead of chicken

steps.title: Crisp chicken
steps.text: Corn flour coated chicken, shallow fry or air fry till golden.

steps.title: Sauce
steps.text: Garlic, chilli, soy, vinegar, splash water - glossy sauce.

steps.title: Toss

rescues.fix: Sauce separate till the last toss
Vinegar and honey balance soy

name: Stir-Fried Chicken Noodles
tagline: Wok hei on a Tuesday, no wok required.

spice.dial_up: Chilli oil or crushed chilli at the end
spice.dial_down: Plain soy build, still satisfying

variants.name: Egg noodles
variants.swaps: Scramble 2 eggs in first, chicken out

ingredients.display: 70g noodles, boiled 1 minute short and rinsed cold

steps.title: Chicken first
steps.text: Highest heat. Oil, chicken strips flat, 90 seconds untouched, then toss till done. Push aside.
steps.cue: Browned edges before the first toss

steps.title: Veg for one loud minute
steps.text: Garlic, onion, capsicum. Keep everything moving.
steps.cue: Veg glossy but still snapping

steps.title: Noodles and soy
steps.text: Cold noodles in, soy around the pan rim so it toasts. Toss with tongs 90 seconds.
steps.cue: Some noodles catch and char - that is the flavor, not a mistake

rescues.fix: They were drained warm - cold rinse and a drop of oil next time; for now splash water and fork apart
Soy went in too early and steamed off - add fresh soy at the rim, plus white pepper

name: Chicken Caesar Wrap
tagline: A salad that learned to commute.

spice.dial_up: Cracked pepper and chilli flakes in the dressing
spice.dial_down: It is already the mild one

ingredients.display: 120g chicken, grilled and sliced, or last night's leftovers
2 handfuls lettuce, torn and very dry
10g parmesan - half in the dressing, half shaved in
1 clove garlic, grated into the dressing
squeeze of lime in the dressing

steps.title: Fake the Caesar
steps.text: Yogurt, grated parmesan, garlic, lime, pepper, pinch of salt. Whisk - anchovy energy without the anchovy.
steps.cue: Dressing thick enough to coat a leaf and hold

steps.title: Toss
steps.text: Lettuce and warm sliced chicken through the dressing.
steps.cue: Every leaf shines, nothing pools

steps.title: Roll tight
steps.text: Onto the warm tortilla, parmesan shavings, roll, seam-sear 30 seconds.
steps.cue: Cross-section shows a green-white spiral

rescues.fix: Pack dressing separately if meal-prepping - assembly takes 60 seconds
It needs more salt and pepper than feels right - Caesar is a salty dish

name: Tandoori Chicken Wrap
tagline: Yesterday's chicken, today's best lunch.

spice.dial_up: Sliced green chilli inside
spice.dial_down: More yogurt, fewer onions

ingredients.sub: quick-sear fresh chicken with chilli powder

ingredients.display: 40g Greek yogurt whisked with mint (2 tbsp)

steps.text: Roti on a dry hot pan 30 seconds a side. Chicken in the same pan for a minute.
steps.cue: Roti puffs slightly, chicken sizzles

steps.title: Build
steps.text: Yogurt spread edge to edge, chicken down the middle, onion, mint, lime.
steps.cue: One clean line of filling - overstuffed wraps split

steps.title: Roll
steps.text: Fold the bottom, roll tight, seam down on the hot pan for 30 seconds.
steps.cue: Seam toasts shut and holds

rescues.fix: Seam-side sear is the glue - do not skip it
More yogurt sauce, or a minute of chicken in the pan with a water splash

name: Paneer Tikka Wrap
tagline: Tandoori flavors rolled for the commute.

steps.title: Marinate paneer

steps.title: Roll tight

rescues.fix: Do not overfill; warm tortilla is flexible
Mint yogurt inside and out saves it

name: Egg Wrap
tagline: Scrambled eggs, rolled tight, out the door in ten.

steps.title: Scramble
steps.text: Eggs soft-scrambled with capsicum-onion. Pull while wet.

steps.title: Fill and roll
steps.text: Eggs on warm tortilla, roll tight, eat immediately.

rescues.fix: Scramble drier if eating handheld
Hot sauce and black pepper fix everything

name: Chicken Club Sandwich
tagline: Triple-decker logic, gym-protein portions.

steps.text: Diagonal cut - club sandwich rules are not optional.

Yogurt spread on every bread surface

name: Buffalo Chicken Wrap

steps.title: Build

rescues.fix: More ranch yogurt in the wrap
Cool chicken 2 min before rolling

name: Chicken Pulao

spice.dial_down: Whole spices only, fish them out before serving

variants.name: Egg pulao

ingredients.display: 70g basmati, rinsed till water runs clear

ingredients.sub: oil, but ghee is the point

ingredients.display: 2 pods cardamom, plus a small piece of cinnamon if around

steps.title: Bloom and brown
steps.text: Ghee, jeera and cardamom till fragrant, onion till properly golden, then ginger and chicken to sear.
steps.cue: Chicken edges brown, whole spices smell like a wedding

steps.title: Rice in
steps.text: Drained rice, garam masala, salt. Stir gently one minute to coat every grain.
steps.cue: Grains turn glossy

steps.title: Steam
steps.text: 1.5 cups hot water and mint. Pressure cook 1 whistle, or lid on lowest flame 12 min. Rest 5 before opening.
steps.cue: Grains stand separate, chicken pulls apart

rescues.fix: Too much water - next time exact 1:1.5 by volume, and never stir after steaming

host.plating: Big serving bowl, fried onions if you have them, raita alongside

name: Egg Pulao
tagline: One pot, whole eggs, the lazy biryani.

steps.text: Boil eggs 7 min, peel, score lightly. Set aside.

steps.title: Pulao base

Add eggs last 5 min only if re-cooking

name: Curd Rice, Protein-Tempered
tagline: The cool-down lap your stomach asked for.

spice.dial_up: Green chilli in the tadka
spice.dial_down: Skip chilli, keep ginger

ingredients.display: 150g cooked rice, slightly overcooked is ideal
50g Greek yogurt - the quiet protein bump

steps.text: Warm rice mashed lightly with salt. Cool 2 min, fold in curd and Greek yogurt.

steps.title: Rest

steps.cue: Flavors settle into the rice

rescues.fix: Curd was already sharp - use fresh curd and add a splash of milk
Loosen with cold milk, not water

steps.title: Blend

Simmer 5 more min uncovered

name: Chocolate Mousse

variants.name: Peanut butter
variants.swaps: Swap 10g chocolate for 15g peanut butter

steps.text: Chocolate in 20-second microwave bursts, stirring between.

Cool filling before pouring on biscuits
